description: Create a 2D kinematic 4-bar linkage mechanism in SolveSpace. The mechanism must include a 55 mm ground link anchored at the origin and constrained to the X-axis, an 18 mm crank starting from the origin, a 32 mm rocker starting from the second ground point, and a 64 mm coupler connecting the crank and rocker. The linkage should remain mobile with unconstrained angles. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/kinematic_linkage.slvs.
